name: GuardianEndorsement
description: Tier-based endorsement NFT issued by RegenHub stewards. Signals an agent has demonstrated exceptional trustworthiness across multiple dimensions. Four tiers: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum.

fields.name: season
fields.description: Season in which the endorsement was earned

fields.name: tokenId
fields.description: Guardian NFT token ID on Base

notes: Influence-heavy. Rare. Issued by stewards, not the game engine. Cannot be self-attested. Highest individual-attestation weight in the system.
